channel.title: TimeHopper Blog
channel.description: Effortless Time Zone Management for Distributed Teams

item.title: Google Calendar Reminders Not Working? Fixes + a Redundancy Plan
item.description: If Google Calendar reminders aren’t firing, work through this checklist—and set up a redundancy plan so you don’t miss important meetings.

item.title: How to Add Holidays to Google Calendar (and Get Them Back if They Disappeared)
item.description: Add holiday calendars to Google Calendar, fix missing holidays, manage multiple countries, and keep your schedule accurate across regions.

item.title: How to Add a Secondary Time Zone in Google Calendar
item.description: Step-by-step guide to adding a secondary time zone column in Google Calendar. Covers desktop setup, labeling, mobile limitations, and when to use it.

item.title: How to Add a Time Zone to Google Calendar (Every Option Explained)
item.description: Every way to add and display time zones in Google Calendar — secondary zones, event zones, world clock sidebar, and workarounds for tracking 3+ zones.

item.title: Best Google Calendar Extensions for 2026: The Efficiency Roundup
item.description: Discover the best Google Calendar Chrome extensions for 2026. A curated list focusing on AI scheduling, quick access, and privacy-first time management.

item.title: How to Change Default Notification Settings in Google Calendar
item.description: Set default notifications in Google Calendar on web, Android, and iOS — plus a notification strategy that prevents missed meetings and alert fatigue.

item.title: How to Color-Code Events in Google Calendar (and a System That Actually Works)
item.description: Color-code Google Calendar events and calendars with a system that makes your week readable at a glance. Fewer colors, more clarity.

item.title: Chrome Extension for Google Calendar: Quick-View Your Schedule Without Switching Tabs
item.description: Compare the best Chrome extensions for quick-view access to Google Calendar. Covers popup speed, notifications, time zones, permissions, and common problems.

item.title: Google Calendar Add-ons vs Chrome Extensions: What's the Difference?
item.description: Add-ons and extensions enhance Google Calendar differently. Here's what each type can do, their trade-offs, and which to choose for your workflow.

item.title: Google Calendar Desktop Notifications Not Working (Chrome / Mac / Windows)
item.description: Desktop notifications fail when any of three permission gates closes — Calendar settings, Chrome, or your OS. Here's the cross-platform fix.

item.title: Google Calendar Notifications Not Working in Chrome? Fix This Checklist
item.description: Restore missing Google Calendar desktop alerts in Chrome. Symptom-based diagnosis, platform-specific fixes for Windows and macOS, and a redundancy plan to never miss a meeting.

item.title: Google Calendar Notification Not Working? Here's How to Fix It
item.description: Google Calendar notifications not working? Identify whether desktop, email, or mobile alerts broke, then follow the right fix for your platform.

item.title: How to Manage Google Calendar Time Zones While Traveling
item.description: A practical guide to managing Google Calendar time zones before, during, and after travel. Covers the swap-or-stay decision, mobile settings, and a pre-flight checklist.

item.title: Time Zone in Google Calendar: What It Controls vs What It Doesn’t
item.description: A clear explanation of Google Calendar time zones: display vs event time zone, what changes when you travel, and what settings actually control.

item.title: Google Calendar Time Zone Wrong? How to Fix It
item.description: Fix wrong time zones in Google Calendar. Diagnose DST shifts, OS mismatches, and sync errors with platform-specific steps for Windows, macOS, Android, and iOS.

item.title: Google Calendar Extension: What to Look For (Evaluation Framework + Scoring Rubric)
item.description: A practical framework for evaluating Google Calendar Chrome extensions. 7 criteria, a copy-paste scoring rubric, and workflow-specific recommendations.

item.title: How to Hide Weekends in Google Calendar (Cleaner Week View)
item.description: Hide weekends in Google Calendar for a cleaner work-week view. Covers desktop, mobile limitations, custom views, non-standard work weeks, and common mistakes.

item.title: Google Calendar Times Changed After Travel? Here's Why and How to Fix It
item.description: Your Google Calendar shows wrong times after traveling. Here's why events shifted and how to fix your display zone, event zones, and mobile sync.

item.title: How to Change Time Zone in Google Calendar (The Complete Guide)
item.description: Master Google Calendar time zone settings: how to change your primary zone, add secondary zones, and understand the difference between display vs event time.

item.title: How to Run Effective Meetings (Fix the System, Not the Agenda)
item.description: Most meeting advice fixes symptoms. Learn how to run effective meetings by fixing what happens before the invite — format, size, and calendar architecture.

item.title: How to Manage Time Zones for Your Remote Team
item.description: Practical strategies for remote teams working across time zones. Covers overlap hours, async-first principles, meeting scheduling, and tool setup.

item.title: How to Track Multiple Time Zones in One Google Calendar View
item.description: Organize 3+ time zones in Google Calendar using secondary zones, the world clock sidebar, and a labeling system that reduces confusion.

item.title: How to Share Your Google Calendar (Without Oversharing)
item.description: Share your Google Calendar safely: choose the right permission level, share with specific people, and avoid exposing event details you don’t want to reveal.

item.title: How to Show Week Numbers in Google Calendar (and Why They Matter for Planning)
item.description: Enable week numbers in Google Calendar for sprint planning, quarterly reviews, and cross-team coordination. Covers ISO weeks, mobile limitations, and common mistakes.

item.title: Time Zone Converter for Meetings: Convert Times Without Mental Math
item.description: Stop doing time zone math in your head. Use these conversion methods, tools, and Google Calendar features to schedule cross-zone meetings correctly every time.

item.title: UTC to Eastern and Pacific Time: Quick Conversion Guide (With DST Rules)
item.description: Convert UTC to Eastern and Pacific time instantly. Includes conversion tables for standard and daylight saving time, plus rules to avoid DST mistakes.

item.title: World Clock + Google Calendar: The Fastest Setup for Remote Teams
item.description: Set up a world clock alongside Google Calendar to coordinate across time zones. Covers Google's built-in world clock, secondary zones, and third-party options.

item.title: 5 World Time Buddy Alternatives Worth Trying in 2026
item.description: World Time Buddy is popular but not perfect. Here are five alternatives — including free web tools, a macOS menu bar app, and a Chrome extension — evaluated honestly across ease of use, DST handling, and calendar integration.
